expectations.text: Ideas specifically address mature or sensitive skin users
expectations.evidence: report.md includes RosaceaLog (rosacea), PeriGlow (更年期), SafeLayer (敏感肌), DermConnect (ロゼーシャ), MindSkin (ロゼーシャ). Demographic is addressed.

expectations.text: Scoring table present for each idea
expectations.evidence: report.md uses 5-axis scoring table per idea. However, axes differ from the skill's rubric (市場規模/差別化/実現可能性/収益性/インパクト vs 実現可能性/開発期間/収益性/競合優位性/小規模適性).

suggestions.assertion: Scoring table present for each idea
suggestions.reason: This passes even when different scoring axes are used. Consider specifying 'uses the 5 dimensions from scoring-rubric.md' to be more precise.

eval_feedback.overall: The scoring table assertion is too lenient — any table passes. Tighten it to check for the specific 5 dimensions.
